creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 162248
patch to update SAGA GIS from 2.2.1 to 2.2.2

The update of SAGA GIS from version 2.2.1 to 2.2.2 is a minor release with some bug fixes and new features.

- slight improvements have been added to the ArcSAGA Toolboxes
- better, more intuititive interaction with PostgreSQL/PostGIS databases
- SAGA GIS project files now support database sources
  as well as various non-native SAGA raster file formats
  (the latter does not yet work for raster files providing more
  than one single band). 


portlint -AC does not complain.

Poudriere builds fine with HEAD (amd64), 10.2 (amd64) and 9.3 (amd64 and i386), with default options. On HEAD, also tested with all options disabled. Logs are attached.
